title: Paste This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates six power phrases to use when prompting Claude Code for faster development workflows. The video covers specific prompting techniques that the Claude Code creator and Andrej Karpathy reportedly use, plus one cautionary phrase that common users misapply.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six power phrases for prompting Claude Code to speed up development cycles. The phrases target project initiation, scaling, and execution, framed as gains available through wording alone rather than better models or plugins. The video notes that these prompting strategies are endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy.
